abp_assumptions.A10: Franchise partner portfolio health maintained — <5% of portfolio in material distress

hedging_actions: Monthly AR review with Finance — any invoice >45 days triggers asset manager call
GM departure protocol: Regional Director on-site within 72 hours for HIGH-risk properties
Annual franchisee financial health review — credit watch list maintained

indicators.name: Franchise revenue vs. budget
indicators.description: Properties materially below RevPAR budget — franchise stability risk
indicators.recommendation: 3/10 franchise properties >15% below RevPAR budget — performance intervention and contract review required.

indicators.name: Worst revenue — RAD010
indicators.description: Franchise property furthest below RevPAR budget
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Hotel Krakow (Poland): RevPAR EUR 64.2 vs budget EUR 88.0 — -27.0% gap.

indicators.name: Management team instability
indicators.description: High-risk GM and key executive vacancies at franchise properties
indicators.recommendation: 4 HIGH-risk management vacancies — guest experience and franchise stability at risk; regional escalation.

indicators.name: HIGH vacancy — RAD007 General Manager
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Hotel Hamburg (Germany): General Manager Resignation — Second GM departure in 18 months — pattern of instability

indicators.name: HIGH vacancy — RAD010 General Manager
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Hotel Krakow (Poland): General Manager Termination — Revenue performance below threshold triggered PIP then termination

indicators.name: HIGH vacancy — RAD025 Director of Finance
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Blu Amsterdam Airport (Netherlands): Director of Finance Resignation — Key control — no replacement identified

indicators.name: HIGH vacancy — RAD022 General Manager
indicators.recommendation: Radisson Blu Milan (Italy): General Manager Resignation — Resigned following labour audit critical finding — urgency to fill

indicators.name: Franchise fee payment status
indicators.description: Overdue and disputed franchise fee invoices
indicators.recommendation: EUR 167k overdue across 7 invoice(s); 2 >30 days — legal notice and withhold-services review.

indicators.name: Franchisee company financial distress
indicators.description: Owner / franchisee company leverage, covenant and credit watch signals
indicators.recommendation: 2 franchisee companies in HIGH financial distress — strategic reserve and early-termination review required.

indicators.name: Distress — Warburg-HIH Invest GmbH
indicators.description: High-severity financial distress at franchise owner company
indicators.recommendation: Warburg-HIH Invest GmbH (Germany): Loan covenant breach — German CRE lender reports Q1 covenant failures in hospitality book

indicators.name: Distress — CBRE Global Investors NL
indicators.description: High-severity financial distress at franchise owner company
indicators.recommendation: CBRE Global Investors NL (Netherlands): Management contract dispute — Formal legal notice served on Radisson re SLA breach — arbitration threatened
